description: How do you want to add expenses — quick entry with just the basics, or detailed with all the info?

divergentInterpretations.label: Quick entry
divergentInterpretations.description: Just the essentials — id and amount. Fast to enter, minimal effort.
divergentInterpretations.rationale: Best when speed matters more than detail.

divergentInterpretations.label: Detailed entry
divergentInterpretations.description: Full details — id, amount, categoryId, merchantName, date, paymentMethod, note, recurringTemplateId. More info captured per expense.
divergentInterpretations.rationale: Best when you want comprehensive records.

divergentInterpretations.label: Flexible
divergentInterpretations.description: Start with the basics, optionally add more details like note, recurringTemplateId.
divergentInterpretations.rationale: Best of both — quick when you want, detailed when you need.

description: Instant validation with clear error messages for all form inputs.
Toast messages for minor errors, inline messages for form errors.
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance with keyboard navigation and screen reader support.
